title: Implement first true Polymarket market-stream-backed pricing path for tracked open positions
objective: Add a narrow server-side Polymarket market stream for tracked open-position assets only, feed a canonical local state hub, and enrich the existing SSE path while keeping fallback polling intact.
acceptance_criteria: live held-side current price backed by true Polymarket stream data for tracked open positions
live equity/unrealized derive from stream-backed price
rollback: Remove core/market_stream.py and core/state_hub.py integration from dashboard_server.py and revert dashboard.html SSE enrichment fields.
